data.title: Weekly Crypto Regs Roundup: SEC Mulls Innovation Exemption, Lummis Backs Bitcoin Tax Break
data.description:
The regulatory landscape for digital assets in the U. S. is evolving rapidly, with policymakers balancing innovation and investor protection ahead of the 2026 election cycle.
source: https://cryptonews.com/news/weekly-crypto-regulation-roundup-sec-mulls-innovation-exemption-lummis-backs-bitcoin-tax-break/

data.title: Trump tariff threat against China causes Bitcoin to fall 3%, $807M in liquidations
data.description:
Bitcoin (BTC) dropped 3% amid a broader market rout after President Donald Trump announced that the US is considering escalating tariffs against China in response to newly imposed rare-earth export controls. Total liquidations reached $807 million over the past 24 hours, as BTC fell to $116,585 as of press time. On a lengthy statement on Oct
source: https://cryptoslate.com/trump-tariff-threat-against-china-causes-bitcoin-to-fall-3-807m-in-liquidations/

data.title: Morgan Stanley Unleashes Crypto Funds for All Wealth Clients – Is a Market Surge Imminent?
data.description:
Morgan Stanley has granted all wealth management clients access to cryptocurrency, removing previous barriers and introducing Bitcoin, Ether, and Solana trading under advisor oversight, while advising a 4% allocation cap to maintain portfolio balance.
source: https://cryptonews.com/news/morgan-stanley-unleashes-crypto-funds-for-all-wealth-clients-is-a-market-surge-imminent/

data.title: Crypto hub Kazakhstan buys 32 tonnes of gold this year
data.description:
The central bank of Kazakhstan has become one of the world’s biggest buyers of gold in 2025, with its governor calling it a better investment than cryptocurrency. Nevertheless, the Central Asian nation, which is trying to position itself as the main crypto hub in the region, is also building a stash of digital assets as […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/crypto-hub-kazakhstan-buys-32-tonnes-of-gold-this-year/

data.title: Canary Capital nears SEC approval for XRP and Solana ETFs amid broader crypto ETF momentum
data.description:
Canary files updated XRP and Solana ETF registrations, cutting fees to 0. 50%. SEC’s crypto-friendly shift speeds up ETF approvals under new listing standards. Pending crypto ETFs may see faster approvals once the US government reopens
source: https://coinjournal.net/news/canary-capital-nears-sec-approval-for-xrp-and-solana-etfs-amid-broader-crypto-etf-momentum/

data.title: Criminals and Their Networks Hold $75B in Crypto Assets, Says Chainalysis
data.description:
Criminals and their downstream networks hold approximately $75 billion in crypto assets obtained through illicit means according to Chainalysis, with darknet market participants controlling over $46. 2 billion and illicit entity balances reaching $15 billion representing a 359% surge from 2020 levels.
source: https://cryptonews.com/news/criminals-and-their-networks-hold-75b-in-crypto-assets-says-chainalysis/

data.title: Hyperliquid User Loses $21 Million Due to Private Key Compromise, Experts Say
data.description:

source: https://decrypt.co/343849/hyperliquid-user-loses-21-million-private-key-compromise

data.title: South Korea’s NTS extends crypto enforcement to cold wallets
data.description:
South Korea' NTS has expanded crypto asset seizures, now targeting offline cold wallet holders.
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/nts-extends-crypto-enforcement/

data.title: If bitcoin forks, the spot ETFs could choose the winner
data.description:
The contentious release of Bitcoin Core v30 is a reminder about the power of spot ETFs to choose which BTC fork earns investment flows.
source: https://protos.com/if-bitcoin-forks-the-spot-etfs-could-choose-the-winner/
